productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Striped Black Trousers
description: Composition Black trousers with white pin stripes, made of 63% polyester, 33% viscose and 4% lycra, has a zipped and button closure, belt loops on the waistband, two insert pockets on the front and two buttoned welt pockets at the back Fit Tapered fit Wash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This stylish pair of formal trousers from scullers for her is perfect for the woman of substance. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” and waist 26”
